task_completion.description: Open the draft medical intake form in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the 'Amani Family Health' document, with 'intake_form_draft.odt' visible in the title bar.

task_completion.description: Insert a text box for the Full Name field and configure its name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box control is added to the document. The 'Control Properties' dialog should be visible at some point showing the 'Name' field set to 'full_name'.

task_completion.description: Insert a date field for the Date of Birth and configure its name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date field control is added to the document. The 'Control Properties' dialog should be visible showing the 'Name' field set to 'dob'.

task_completion.description: Insert three option buttons for Gender and configure their names and reference values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three option buttons (radio buttons) are added for Male, Female, and Non-Binary. The 'Control Properties' dialog should show the 'Name' field set to 'gender' and 'Reference value (on)' set to 'M', 'F', or 'NB' respectively.

task_completion.description: Insert three checkboxes for Medical History and configure their names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three checkboxes are added next to Asthma, Diabetes, and Hypertension. The 'Control Properties' dialog should show the 'Name' field set to 'hist_asthma', 'hist_diabetes', or 'hist_hypertension'.

task_completion.description: Save the completed interactive form to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible with the file name 'intake_form_interactive.odt' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the word processor's title bar updates to 'intake_form_interactive.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application, utilizing the Form Design toolbar.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual interactive form controls rather than plain text approximations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual presence of actual form control elements (text boxes, date fields, radio buttons, checkboxes) and their properties dialogs, rather than typed characters like '[ ]' or '( )'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing python scripts, sed/awk commands, or direct XML manipulation of the .odt file to insert the form controls.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The draft document is located at /home/ga/Documents/intake_form_draft.odt. The required form controls are: Text Box named 'full_name', Date Field named 'dob', 3 Option Buttons named 'gender' (reference values 'M', 'F', 'NB'), and 3 Checkboxes named 'hist_asthma', 'hist_diabetes', 'hist_hypertension'. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/intake_form_interactive.odt. The organization name in the document is 'Amani Family Health'.
